strategy_intent: Mirroring the profound pain of the rejection, the historical weight of Kota, and the immediate physical paralysis.
text: Yeh sunkar poori tarah samajh aa raha hai ki roomie ko offer letter milte dekh aapke andar pichle saalon ka poora bojh wapas aa gaya hai. speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi lachari sabse zyada chubh rahi hai. Maine Kota mein do saal ghut-ghut kar nikaale taaki Bapuji khush ho sakein, par aaj lag raha hai ki meri mehnat ki koi aukaat hi nahi hai. strategy_intent: Validating the exhaustion of living for someone else's dreams and the deep inadequacy triggered by peer comparison.
text: Aisa astitva-heen mehsoos karna bahut dardnak hai, khaskar jab aapne apni life ke itne saal sirf doosron ki umeedon ko poora karne mein jhonk diye hon. coping_shade_signal: ghabrahat se meri saans atak rahi hai
text: Bilkul. Dimaag mein ek loop chal raha hai ki 'ab ghar kya bolunga'. Bapuji ko jab pata chalega toh wo kahenge ki Kota ki fees waste ho gayi. Main kisi ka phone nahi uthana chahta. Ye ghabrahat badhti ja rahi hai aur kamre ke andar mera dum ghut raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing into the physical sensation of panic to identify the loudest fear.
text: Jab wo fees aur parivaar ke taano ki awaaz dimaag mein continuously goonj rahi hai aur aapko is kamre mein ghutan mehsoos ho rahi hai... toh is panic ke beech aapka sabse bada darr kya ban gaya hai?

strategy_intent: Reflecting the user's perception that this academic rejection translates directly to personal worthlessness and failing the family.

strategy_intent: Mirroring the frustration towards external pressure to 'move on' immediately, validating the need to grieve.

strategy_intent: Challenging the societal stigma around expressing academic grief and vulnerability.
